SELECT AVG("employee_count") AS average_employee_count
FROM accounts
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "sign_ups" FROM "users"

FROM "tickets"

SQLQuery: 
SELECT 
    p."name" AS product_name, 
    b."name" AS brand_name
FROM 
    products p
LEFT JOIN 
    brands b ON p."brand_id" = b."id"
LIMIT 5

SELECT "pr"."title" AS "review_title", "p"."name" AS "product_name"
FROM "product_reviews" AS "pr"
JOIN "products" AS "p" ON "pr"."product_id" = "p"."id"
LIMIT 5

SQLQuery: 
SELECT 
    "subscriptions"."id" AS "subscription_id", 
    "plans"."name" AS "plan_name"
FROM 
    "subscriptions"
JOIN 
    "plans" ON "subscriptions"."plan_id" = "plans"."id"
LIMIT 5

SQLQuery: 
SELECT "orders"."order_number", "users"."email"
FROM "orders"
JOIN "users" ON "orders"."user_id" = "users"."id"
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
    "products"."id", 
    "products"."name"
FROM 
    "products"
LEFT JOIN 
    "product_reviews" ON "products"."id" = "product_reviews"."product_id"
WHERE 
    "product_reviews"."id" IS NULL
LIMIT 5

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM subscriptions
JOIN plans ON subscriptions.plan_id = plans.id
WHERE plans.name = 'pro' AND subscriptions.status = 'active'

SQLQuery: 
SELECT "currency_code", SUM("grand_total") AS total_revenue
FROM "orders"
GROUP BY "currency_code"
LIMIT 5

SQLQuery: 
SELECT "tenant_id", COUNT("id") AS "order_count"
FROM orders
GROUP BY "tenant_id"
LIMIT 5

SELECT "p"."name", AVG("pr"."rating") AS "average_rating"
FROM "products" AS "p"
JOIN "product_reviews" AS "pr" ON "p"."id" = "pr"."product_id"
GROUP BY "p"."name"
HAVING AVG("pr"."rating") > 4
LIMIT 5

SELECT "user_id", COUNT("id") AS "order_count"
FROM "orders"
GROUP BY "user_id"
HAVING COUNT("id") > 3
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
    "addresses"."country_id",
    SUM("orders"."grand_total") AS total_revenue
FROM 
    "orders"
JOIN 
    "addresses" ON "orders"."shipping_address_id" = "addresses"."id"
GROUP BY 
    "addresses"."country_id"
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
    p."name", 
    SUM(oi."quantity") AS total_units_sold
FROM 
    "order_items" oi
JOIN 
    "product_variants" pv ON oi."product_variant_id" = pv."id"
JOIN 
    "products" p ON pv."product_id" = p."id"
GROUP BY 
    p."name"
ORDER BY 
    total_units_sold DESC
LIMIT 5

SQLQuery: 
SELECT DISTINCT "users"."email"
FROM "users"
JOIN "payment_refunds" ON "users"."id" = "payment_refunds"."user_id"
LIMIT 5

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "user_id") AS "user_count"
FROM "orders"
JOIN "addresses" AS "billing" ON "orders"."billing_address_id" = "billing"."id"
JOIN "addresses" AS "shipping" ON "orders"."shipping_address_id" = "shipping"."id"
WHERE "billing"."country_id" = (
    SELECT "id" FROM "countries" WHERE "iso2" = 'DE'
) OR "shipping"."country_id" = (
    SELECT "id" FROM "countries" WHERE "iso2" = 'DE'
)

SQLQuery: 
SELECT "p"."code", COUNT("s"."id") AS "active_subscriptions_count"
FROM "subscriptions" AS "s"
JOIN "plans" AS "p" ON "s"."plan_id" = "p"."id"
WHERE "s"."status" = 'active'
GROUP BY "p"."code"
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', "created_at") AS "month", 
    COUNT(*) AS "order_count"
FROM 
    orders
WHERE 
    "created_at" >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '12 months')
GROUP BY 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', "created_at")
ORDER BY 
    "month" DESC
LIMIT 12

SQLQuery: 
SELECT "tenant_id", SUM("grand_total") AS total_revenue
FROM "orders"
GROUP BY "tenant_id"
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ("resolved_at" - "created_at")) / 86400) AS average_days_to_resolve
FROM support.tickets
WHERE "resolved_at" IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS "matching_orders_count"
FROM "orders" o
JOIN "users" u ON o."user_id" = u."id"
WHERE o."tenant_id" = u."tenant_id"

SQLQuery: 
SELECT "c"."name", COUNT("pc"."product_id") AS "product_count"
FROM "categories" AS "c"
JOIN "product_categories" AS "pc" ON "c"."id" = "pc"."category_id"
GROUP BY "c"."name"
ORDER BY "product_count" DESC
LIMIT 3

SELECT SUM("grand_total") AS total_revenue
FROM "orders"
WHERE "currency_code" = 'EUR'

SQLQuery: 
SELECT 
    COUNT("cancelled_at")::float / COUNT(*) AS cancellation_fraction
FROM 
    orders

SQLQuery: 
SELECT "name", "employee_count" 
FROM accounts 
WHERE "employee_count" > 100 
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
    "plans"."name" AS "plan_name",
    AVG("orders"."grand_total") AS "average_order_value"
FROM 
    "orders"
JOIN 
    "subscriptions" ON "orders"."user_id" = "subscriptions"."user_id"
JOIN 
    "plans" ON "subscriptions"."plan_id" = "plans"."id"
GROUP BY 
    "plans"."name"
LIMIT 5

SQLQuery: 
SELECT "status", COUNT(*) AS "count"
FROM "billing"."invoices"
WHERE "paid_at" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY "status"
LIMIT 5

SQLQuery: 
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "bounced_sessions_count"
FROM "analytics"."web_sessions"
WHERE "is_bounce" = true

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM coupons 
WHERE "status" = 'active'

FROM "payment_refunds"

SQLQuery: 
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', "occurred_at") AS "month", 
    COUNT(*) AS "event_count"
FROM 
    analytics.events
GROUP BY 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', "occurred_at")

SELECT "status", COUNT(*) 
FROM job_runs

GROUP BY "status"

SELECT 
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "bounced_at" IS NOT NULL) AS bounced_count,
    COUNT(*) AS total_count
FROM 
    campaign_messages

SELECT "currency_code", SUM("total") AS "total_invoiced_amount"
FROM "invoices"
GROUP BY "currency_code"
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
    "tenant_id", 
    COUNT(*) AS "open_opportunities_count"
FROM 
    "opportunities"
WHERE 
    "is_closed" = FALSE
GROUP BY 
    "tenant_id"
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
    "n"."title" AS "Notification Title",
    "u"."email" AS "User Email"
FROM 
    "notifications" AS "n"
JOIN 
    "users" AS "u" ON "n"."user_id" = "u"."id"
LIMIT 5

SQLQuery: 
SELECT 
    "opportunities"."name" AS "opportunity_name", 
    "pipelines"."name" AS "pipeline_name"
FROM 
    "opportunities"
JOIN 
    "pipelines" ON "opportunities"."pipeline_id" = "pipelines"."id"
LIMIT 5

SQLQuery: 
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "payment_refunds"."id") AS "refund_count"
FROM "payment_refunds"
JOIN "payments" ON "payment_refunds"."payment_id" = "payments"."id"
WHERE "payments"."status" = 'captured'

SELECT 
    "c"."id", 
    "c"."code", 
    "c"."status"
FROM 
    "coupons" AS "c"
LEFT JOIN 
    "coupon_redemptions" AS "cr" ON "c"."id" = "cr"."coupon_id"
WHERE 
    "cr"."id" IS NULL
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
    "c"."code", 
    SUM("cr"."discount_amount") AS "total_discount"
FROM 
    "coupon_redemptions" AS "cr"
JOIN 
    "coupons" AS "c" ON "cr"."coupon_id" = "c"."id"
GROUP BY 
    "c"."code"
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
    "rated_agent_id", 
    AVG("score") AS "average_score"
FROM 
    "csat_responses"
GROUP BY 
    "rated_agent_id"
HAVING 
    AVG("score") < 3
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
    c."name" AS campaign_name, 
    COUNT(cm."id") AS message_count
FROM 
    campaign_messages cm
JOIN 
    campaigns c ON cm."campaign_id" = c."id"
GROUP BY 
    c."name"
HAVING 
    COUNT(cm."id") > 100
LIMIT 5

SQLQuery: 
SELECT 
    "p"."name", 
    COUNT("o"."id") AS "won_opportunities_count"
FROM 
    "pipelines" AS "p"
JOIN 
    "opportunities" AS "o" ON "p"."id" = "o"."pipeline_id"
WHERE 
    "o"."is_won" = TRUE
GROUP BY 
    "p"."name"
ORDER BY 
    "won_opportunities_count" DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', "occurred_at") AS "month",
    SUM("amount") OVER (ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "occurred_at")) AS "running_total"
FROM 
    "ledger_entries"
WHERE 
    "direction" = 'debit'
GROUP BY 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', "occurred_at")
ORDER BY 
    "month"
LIMIT 5
results.error: column "ledger_entries.amount" must appear in the GROUP BY clause or be used in an aggregate function

results.pred_sql:
SELECT "event_name", COUNT(*) AS "event_count"
FROM analytics.events
GROUP BY "event_name"
ORDER BY "event_count" DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
    sa."display_name", 
    AVG(cr."score") AS average_csat_score
FROM 
    csat_responses cr
JOIN 
    support_agents sa ON cr."rated_agent_id" = sa."id"
GROUP BY 
    sa."display_name"
LIMIT 5

SQLQuery: 
SELECT 
    "w"."name" AS "warehouse_name", 
    COUNT("sm"."id") AS "stock_movements_count"
FROM 
    "stock_movements" AS "sm"
JOIN 
    "stock_locations" AS "sl" ON "sm"."stock_location_id" = "sl"."id"
JOIN 
    "warehouses" AS "w" ON "sl"."warehouse_id" = "w"."id"
GROUP BY 
    "w"."name"
LIMIT 5

SELECT DISTINCT "u"."email"
FROM "marketing"."campaign_messages" AS "cm"
JOIN "users" AS "u" ON "cm"."user_id" = "u"."id"
LEFT JOIN "orders" AS "o" ON "cm"."user_id" = "o"."user_id"
WHERE "cm"."opened_at" IS NOT NULL
  AND "o"."id" IS NULL
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
    "plans"."code" AS "plan_code", 
    SUM("invoices"."total") AS "total_invoiced_amount"
FROM 
    "invoices"
JOIN 
    "subscriptions" ON "invoices"."subscription_id" = "subscriptions"."id"
JOIN 
    "plans" ON "subscriptions"."plan_id" = "plans"."id"
WHERE 
    "invoices"."status" = 'paid'
GROUP BY 
    "plans"."code"
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
    "countries"."name" AS "country_name",
    SUM("returns"."refund_total") AS "total_refunded_amount"
FROM 
    "returns"
JOIN 
    "orders" ON "returns"."order_id" = "orders"."id"
JOIN 
    "addresses" ON "orders"."shipping_address_id" = "addresses"."id"
JOIN 
    "countries" ON "addresses"."country_id" = "countries"."id"
GROUP BY 
    "countries"."name"
LIMIT 5

SELECT COUNT(*) AS "matching_notifications_count"
FROM "notifications" n
JOIN "users" u ON n."user_id" = u."id"
WHERE n."tenant_id" = u."tenant_id"

SELECT DISTINCT "u"."email"
FROM "subscriptions" AS "s"
JOIN "plans" AS "p" ON "s"."plan_id" = "p"."id"
JOIN "users" AS "u" ON "s"."user_id" = "u"."id"
JOIN "tickets" AS "t" ON "u"."id" = "t"."requester_user_id"
WHERE "s"."status" = 'active'
  AND "p"."name" = 'enterprise'
  AND "t"."id" IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 5

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM carts 
WHERE "status" = 'abandoned'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS "delivered_fulfillments_count"
FROM "fulfillments"
WHERE "delivered_at" IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "purchase_order_id") AS "fully_received_count"
FROM "purchase_order_lines"
GROUP BY "purchase_order_id"
HAVING SUM("quantity_ordered") = SUM("quantity_received")

SQLQuery: 
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM "login_attempts" 
WHERE "succeeded" = false

SELECT COUNT(*) AS approved_returns_count
FROM returns
WHERE "approved_at" IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS "failed_emails_count"
FROM "email_log"
WHERE "status" != 'delivered'

SELECT AVG("duration_seconds") AS average_duration
FROM analytics.page_views

SELECT 
    "gateway", 
    SUM("amount") AS total_captured_amount
FROM 
    "payments"
WHERE 
    "captured_at" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
    "gateway"
LIMIT 5

SQLQuery: 
SELECT "status", COUNT(*) AS "order_count"
FROM "orders"
GROUP BY "status"
LIMIT 5

SQLQuery: 
SELECT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM "occurred_at") AS "hour", COUNT(*) AS "event_count"
FROM analytics.events
GROUP BY "hour"
ORDER BY "event_count" DESC
LIMIT 5

SQLQuery: 
SELECT 
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "status" = 'sent')::float / COUNT(*) AS success_fraction
FROM 
    email_log

SELECT "ticket_id", COUNT("id") AS "message_count"
FROM "ticket_messages"
GROUP BY "ticket_id"
HAVING COUNT("id") >= 8
LIMIT 5

SELECT "order_id", SUM("line_total") AS "total_line_value"
FROM "order_items"
GROUP BY "order_id"
ORDER BY "total_line_value" DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT 
    "s"."tracking_number", 
    "o"."order_number"
FROM 
    "shipments" AS "s"
JOIN 
    "fulfillments" AS "f" ON "s"."fulfillment_id" = "f"."id"
JOIN 
    "orders" AS "o" ON "f"."order_id" = "o"."id"
WHERE 
    "s"."delivered_at" IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
    "contacts"."first_name", 
    "contacts"."last_name", 
    "accounts"."name" AS "account_name"
FROM 
    "contacts"
JOIN 
    "accounts" ON "contacts"."account_id" = "accounts"."id"
LIMIT 5

SQLQuery: 
SELECT "kind", COUNT(*) AS "captured_payments_count"
FROM "billing"."payments"
JOIN "billing"."payment_methods" ON "payments"."payment_method_id" = "payment_methods"."id"
WHERE "payments"."status" = 'captured'
GROUP BY "kind"
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
    "brands"."name" AS "brand_name", 
    SUM("order_items"."quantity") AS "total_quantity_sold"
FROM 
    "order_items"
JOIN 
    "product_variants" ON "order_items"."product_variant_id" = "product_variants"."id"
JOIN 
    "products" ON "product_variants"."product_id" = "products"."id"
JOIN 
    "brands" ON "products"."brand_id" = "brands"."id"
GROUP BY 
    "brands"."name"
LIMIT 5

SQLQuery: 
SELECT w."name", COUNT(f."id") AS fulfillment_count
FROM fulfillments f
JOIN warehouses w ON f."warehouse_id" = w."id"
WHERE f."shipped_at" IS NOT NULL OR f."delivered_at" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY w."name"
ORDER BY fulfillment_count DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
    "currency_code", 
    SUM("amount") AS "total_succeeded_refund_amount"
FROM 
    "payment_refunds"
WHERE 
    "status" = 'succeeded'
GROUP BY 
    "currency_code"
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
    "user_id", 
    "created_at", 
    SUM("grand_total") OVER (PARTITION BY "user_id" ORDER BY "created_at" ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS "running_total"
FROM 
    orders
ORDER BY 
    "user_id", 
    "created_at"
LIMIT 50

WITH monthly_orders AS (
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC('month', "created_at") AS month,
        COUNT(*) AS order_count
    FROM orders
    GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "created_at")
    ORDER BY month
),
monthly_change AS (
    SELECT 
        month,
        order_count,
        order_count - LAG(order_count) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS change_from_previous_month
    FROM monthly_orders
)
SELECT 
    month,
    order_count,
    change_from_previous_month
FROM monthly_change
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
    "owner_user_id", 
    COUNT(*) AS "won_deals_count"
FROM 
    "opportunities"
WHERE 
    "is_won" = TRUE
GROUP BY 
    "owner_user_id"
ORDER BY 
    "won_deals_count" DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "users"."id") AS "users_without_successful_login"
FROM "users"
LEFT JOIN "login_attempts" ON "users"."id" = "login_attempts"."user_id" AND "login_attempts"."succeeded" = TRUE
WHERE "login_attempts"."id" IS NULL

SELECT "p"."name", COUNT("pr"."id") AS "approved_reviews_count"
FROM "products" AS "p"
JOIN "product_reviews" AS "pr" ON "p"."id" = "pr"."product_id"
WHERE "pr"."is_approved" = true
GROUP BY "p"."name"
ORDER BY "approved_reviews_count" DESC
LIMIT 10
